prose:
Ethane C–C torsional (H–C–C–H) rotation barrier — semi-empirical tight-binding, GFN2-xTB (xtb backend) in the chemkit conformational-analysis skill, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1.

Geometry provenance: user-supplied ethane.xyz; a 24-point relaxed dihedral scan about atoms 3-1-2-6 was carried out at the same level (GFN2-xTB//GFN2-xTB). All scan points converged.

Rotation barrier (eclipsed → staggered): ΔE‡ = 2.58599 kcal mol⁻¹.

No warnings were reported; integrity check marked the result trustworthy.

Command (see result JSON `cli_invocation`): `... scan --method xtb ethane.xyz`. Log and trajectory files were written alongside the result JSON (live `.out` path in run directory).
